allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Redesign UI: menu bar, Client/Entity Manager, dark toolbar, auto-save

- Replace nav bar with full menu bar \(File, Clients, Returns, Tools, Reports, Admin, Help\)
- Add dark toolbar with back navigation, tax year selector, user avatar, status bar
- Dashboard becomes Client Manager \(home page\) with search, entity counts, CRUD
- ClientDetail becomes Entity Manager with table view, search, create/delete entities
- New EntityDetail page for tax years, trial balance, and return management per entity
- Clients page gets sortable columns, return status filter, enriched row data
- Enable all entity types \(partnership, ccorp, trust, individual\) with migration
- FormEditor: add 10-second auto-save interval, remove manual Save All button
- Add Start TTS Tax App.bat launcher script for one-click dev startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "cd D:\\dev\\tts-tax-app\\server; poetry run python -c ''from apps.returns.models import FormSection; [print\(s.code, s.title\) for s in FormSection.objects.filter\(form__code=""1120-S""\).order_by\(""sort_order""\)]''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "cd D:\\dev\\tts-tax-app\\server; $env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=''config.settings.dev''; poetry run python -c ''import django; django.setup\(\); from apps.returns.models import FormSection; [print\(s.code, s.title\) for s in FormSection.objects.filter\(form__code=""1120-S""\).order_by\(""sort_order""\)]''")
